shots.focus: Deep focus, with the entire cityscape from the foreground buildings to the distant lights appearing sharp.
shots.movement: A slow, dramatic pull-back, starting relatively close on a large screen between buildings and gradually revealing a vast, sprawling cityscape at night.
shots.composition: The shot opens on a massive digital screen displaying a statue of a man, with a smaller screen below it. As the camera pulls back, it reveals a futuristic, densely packed city at night, with countless illuminated windows on towering skyscrapers. The camera's viewpoint creates reflections on glass surfaces in the foreground, adding layers and complexity to the image. The scene is dark, punctuated by the warm, golden lights of the city, conveying a sense of epic scale and grandeur.
shots.graphicsOverlays: On a screen within the shot: "OCTOBER'S VERY OWN ARENA". To the left of the text is the OVO owl logo, and to the right is a logo of a person's head in profile.

shots.focus: The text is in sharp focus.
shots.movement: A very slow and subtle push-in on the text.
shots.composition: This is a title card set against a solid black background. The text is centered, featuring the director's credit. The words "DIRECTED BY" appear in a smaller, simpler font above the main name. The name "GIBSON HAZARD" is rendered in a large, blocky, stylized font with a blue gradient, a white outline, and a soft blue outer glow, evoking a retro sci-fi or 80s action movie aesthetic.
